rationale: The Russia-Ukraine war continues at background level; the US airstrike on Tren de Aragua is a distant event but signals US willingness to use force, which has marginal relevance to Ukrainian hopes for Western support. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike, Trump says
top_events.summary: US confirmed use of military force against a foreign gang leader; for Ukrainians, this is a distant action but marginally signals US military assertiveness — no direct aid or policy change for Ukraine.

top_events.title: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
top_events.summary: A human-interest story about Russian war grief; confirms ongoing high Russian casualties but no new military or policy development affecting Ukraine's situation.

top_events.title: Israel expands military control in Gaza, Lebanon and Syria by 1,000sq km
top_events.summary: Middle East escalation draws Western attention away from Ukraine but no confirmed reduction in aid or support this cycle.
